skill_text:
A speech-to-speech translation model with two-pass decoder (UnitY) trained on Hokkien-English data from TED, drama, and TAT domains. It uses Facebook's Unit HiFiGAN for speech synthesis. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Speech-to-speech translation. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/xm_transformer_unity_hk-en'). This tool has no required input.
When to use:
- Use `fairseq__xm_transformer_unity_hk_en__load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_2fc85951` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
- Do not use when required inputs are missing.
when_to_use: Use `fairseq__xm_transformer_unity_hk_en__load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_2fc85951` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
This tool has no required input fields.
